title: Signed Output (Worker → Manager)
description: Every worker output uses this schema. Untraceable output does not move upstream. Source: AGENT_PRODUCT_CYCLE.md §Signed Output Schema and §Worker Decision Tree (status enum expanded).

task_id.description: Identifier for the task this output fulfills.

status.description: Status values per §Worker Decision Tree. complete/partial/failed/flagged are the four base statuses; the remaining four cover decision-tree branches (missing capability, disputed attribution, prompt-version conflict, etc).

confidence.description: Worker self-assessed confidence (0.0–1.0). Outputs with confidence < 0.7 must be returned with status: flagged. Threshold can be raised per agent in the registry but never lowered below 0.5.

output.description: Task-specific output payload. Schema defined per task type.

assumptions_made.description: Each assumption made during execution, stated explicitly.

flags.description: Structured flags per the Worker Decision Tree (e.g. {type: 'missing_capability', tool_needed: '...', reason: '...'}).

reflection.description: Inline reflection — see /schemas/workers/reflection/ for the canonical reflection schema.

tool_calls.description: Ordered list of tool invocations made during execution.

model.description: Full date-stamped model string used for this execution.

prompt_version.description: Semver of the agent system prompt used for this execution.
